note: IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE — keep SEPARATE from scoring. Do NOT show to candidates during evaluation.

benchmark.technical: Expert in at least one backend language (Python/Java/Go). Comfortable with REST APIs, databases, and message queues.
benchmark.cloud_devops: 3+ years AWS or GCP. CI/CD with GitHub Actions/Jenkins. Docker and Kubernetes proficiency.
benchmark.system_design: Can design horizontally scalable systems. Understands CAP theorem, caching strategies, and microservices patterns.
benchmark.leadership: Has mentored 2+ junior developers. Has led a project end-to-end or a small team.
benchmark.communication: Produces thorough technical documentation. Has worked with cross-functional teams.
